evals.prompt: 请给 skills/image-gen/evals/test-composition.html 这个组合配图。分析HTML内容，确定哪些场景需要插图，为每个插图生成中文提示词，然后将图片元素插入到HTML中合适的位置。注意：不需要真的调用API生成图片，只需要分析并修改HTML，把图片路径和提示词写好就行。
evals.expected_output: A modified HTML file with image elements inserted at appropriate locations, each with Chinese prompts as comments or data attributes, proper hyperframes data-start/data-duration/data-track-index, and entrance animations in GSAP.

evals.prompt: 我想给这个视频组合添加配图：skills/image-gen/evals/test-composition.html。主题是AI技术趋势，请用智谱的GLM-Image模型为每个场景生成合适的插图。你不需要实际调用API，只需要：1）分析哪些场景适合加图；2）为每张图写好中文prompt；3）把img标签和动画加到HTML里。
evals.expected_output: Analysis of which scenes benefit from images, Chinese prompts for each, and HTML with img elements, GSAP entrance animations, and proper timing.

evals.prompt: 帮这个组合配图：skills/image-gen/evals/test-composition.html。我想要商务科技风格的插图，图片放在文字右边。不需要真的生成图片，把prompt和HTML改动写好就行。
evals.expected_output: HTML modified with right-aligned images in business/tech style, Chinese prompts reflecting the tech theme, and consistent placement strategy.
